primary_outcome: 12周 VISA-P 总分相对基线的变化；重返活动状态和指定负荷活动疼痛为次要结局（待临床确认）

voice_input.reason: Removed from the clinical workflow at the user's request because it was not usable in practice.

workflow.last_verified_action: On 2026-07-15, the clinical user requested a clinician-first redesign: manual slider capture for affected/reference knee, affected hip, and knee-to-wall measures; VAS; auto-generated Feishu/local follow-up charts; a simplified patient-facing return-to-sport comparison; and removal of voice entry. The app now uses a literature-calibrated 24-week communication reference anchored to published progressive tendon-loading trial outcomes, with deliberately small transparent modifiers for current function, pain, symptom duration, and recent rehabilitation adherence. It is not represented as an externally validated prediction model.
workflow.pending_human_gate: none_for_test_prototype; future clinic release requires production privacy, access-control, and governance confirmation
confirmed_decisions: Clinical scope, red flags, and 12-week VISA-P change as the primary outcome confirmed by clinical user on 2026-07-14
Clinical user supplied and authorized the Chinese VISA-P questionnaire for direct in-app use on 2026-07-14
Patient information screenshot import will use in-process local OCR with review-before-apply and no image retention
Voice entry was removed from the active workflow at the clinical user's request on 2026-07-15
Knee-to-wall is stored as a distance in cm, consistent with standard clinical performance of that test
Patient return-to-sport display uses a 24-week literature communication reference, not a validated individual-risk model
assumptions_pending_clinical_signoff: Target population: adults or near-adults with clinician-diagnosed or strongly suspected patellar tendinopathy
Primary outcome: 12-week VISA-P total change from baseline
PROM mode: authorized Chinese VISA-P item display and scoring
Production storage: user-owned Feishu Base after local prototype verification
workflow.next_automatic_action: When converting this test prototype to clinic use, make the repository and deployment private, restrict app access, define retention and access roles, review patient-data hosting agreements, and rotate production secrets before entering real patient data.
